name: teamspy
description: Standalone Microsoft Teams directory desktop app
author: gieseking

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,electron,app -c yellow,cyan,green "pnpm dev:renderer" "pnpm dev:electron" "pnpm dev:app"
scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build:electron && vite build
scripts.dist:dir: pnpm build && pnpm prepare:package && electron-builder --projectDir bundle --config ../electron-builder.json --dir
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm build && pnpm prepare:package && electron-builder --projectDir bundle --config ../electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:win: pnpm build && pnpm prepare:package && electron-builder --projectDir bundle --config ../electron-builder.json --win nsis portable zip
